items.claim: Kai Kamaka has a career pattern of winning fights by decision.
items.quote: 14 wins by decision. For reference, he's got 18 pro victories. 14 out of the 18 are by decision for Kai Kamaka.

items.claim: Luke Riley possesses superior speed compared to Kai Kamaka.
Luke Riley hits harder than Kai Kamaka.
items.quote: I think Luke Riley hits harder.

items.claim: Kai Kamaka lacks the ability to secure knockout finishes.
Luke Riley has sufficient takedown defense to prevent Kai Kamaka from out-wrestling him.
items.quote: I think Riley has a good enough takedown defense, I think... I don't think Kamaka is able to just truly out wrestle him in this fight

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt was outstruck by Long Xiao 60 to 28 in their recent fight.
items.quote: Cody Garbrandt gets outstruck by Long Xiao 60 to 28.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt has only one knockout victory in the last six years.
items.quote: His only knockout in the last what, 6 years is Bryan Kelleher.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt struggles to pull the trigger on his strikes.
items.quote: Cody hits hard and still sharp, but he does not pull the trigger.

items.claim: Adrian Yanez has been more competitive in his recent fights than his record suggests, with arguments for him being on a three-fight win streak.
items.quote: you could definitely make the case that Yanez should be riding into this fight with a three-fight winning streak.
